sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters"> <x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_class_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>rjoy</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2021-07-21 05:14:11</sys_created_on> <sys_id>a5a524ecdb2d78501e1792c5d4961913</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>21</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>My Scheduled Tasks</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Tasker" source="x_153465_discovert">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Tasker">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters_a5a524ecdb2d78501e1792c5d4961913</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>rjoy</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2022-05-24 11:47:19</sys_updated_on> <u_active>true</u_active> <u_banner_list_page_id/> <u_banner_list_view_name/> <u_direction>asc</u_direction> <u_discover_controller_url>false</u_discover_controller_url> <u_field_list>number, name, next_run_date, tasker_process, repeat_description, start_date, repeat_until_type, repeat_until, occurrences, occurence_count, last_run, originator</u_field_list> <u_filter>originatorDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^schedule_complete_flag=false</u_filter> <u_filter_label>My Scheduled Tasks</u_filter_label> <u_filter_menu_header>MY SCHEDULED TASKS</u_filter_menu_header> <u_filter_page>my_task_home_page</u_filter_page> <u_hover_field>name</u_hover_field> <u_include_comments>false</u_include_comments> <u_modal_title_field_separator>:</u_modal_title_field_separator> <u_modal_title_fields>number,name</u_modal_title_fields> <u_order/> <u_order_by>next_run_date</u_order_by> <u_show_in_filter_menu>true</u_show_in_filter_menu> <u_table display_value="Scheduled Tasks" name="x_153465_discovert_tasker_schedule">c1bc6cc9db0401101e1792c5d4961995</u_table> <u_view_all_page/> </x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters> </record_update>
